rules.description: Python code style - applies to all Python files
rules.rule: Follow Python code style: 4-space indent, 80 char line length, snake_case for functions/variables, CapWords for classes, type annotations required for public APIs. See .claude/rules/python.md

rules.description: Security - applies to files with auth, secrets, input handling
rules.rule: Security zero-trust: no hardcoded secrets, whitelist validation, pathlib for paths. See .claude/rules/security.md
